metadata.description: Deploys an Azure Container Instance running PowerShell that sends random test emails via Microsoft Graph API. Requires a User-Assigned Managed Identity with Mail.Send Graph API application permission.

Full resource ID of a User-Assigned Managed Identity that has Mail.Send application permission on Microsoft Graph. Example: /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{name}
URL to download the Random_Content.zip file containing ebook.txt, MOV, MP3, and JPG folders.
Comma-separated list of recipient email addresses.
Sender email address (must be a valid mailbox the managed identity can send as).
Number of emails to send to each recipient.
Percentage of emails that will include the GTUBE spam test string (0-100).
